title: evansia dichotoma
intro: Evansia dichotoma, also known as the Dichotomous Evansia or split fork, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a compound called dichotomous acid, a potential anti-inflammatory agent. The seeds of the Evansia dichotoma plant are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The seeds can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and are also used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
